pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or recognize JDK 21 language features and class files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag for modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with JDK 21 can lead to mismatched bootstrap classpaths or missing module info; release is the standard for JDK 9+.
